title: Pod Security Admission (PSA)
description: Implement Pod Security Admission (PSA) to enforce security standards on pods. Design namespaces with Restricted, Baseline, and Privileged profiles to apply the principle of least privilege at runtime.
objectives: Implement Pod Security Admission (PSA) to enforce security standards on pods.
Design namespaces with Restricted, Baseline, and Privileged profiles to apply the principle of least privilege at runtime.
